title: Vessel Cubes
description: Capture mobs and carry them around in Vessel Boxes! They are not like anything else you've seen before, and super easy to carry around too!
body:
![VESSEL CUBES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/686c0f1c5b43cb6dcc1dd6097a17376d7f910818.png)

Capture mobs and carry them around in Vessel Cubes!

They are not like anything else you've seen before, and super easy to carry around too!

Upgrade their GRADES to have better odds at capturing mobs!

(Pets are always a 100% chance)

THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib

SERIOUSLY DOWNLOAD IT!

(literally won't work without it..)


MY OTHER MODS

KNIGHY'S MYSTICAL CREATURES

vvv Chances For Captures vvv

GRADE 0

Passive Mobs: 50% +0.75% Chance for each percentage of Health Lowered

Hostile Mobs: 0% +0.5% Chance for each percentage of Health Lowered

GRADE 1

Passive Mobs: 70% +1% Chance for each percentage of Health Lowered

Hostile Mobs: 15% +0.5% Chance for each percentage of Health Lowered

GRADE 2

Passive Mobs: 90% +1.5% Chance for each percentage of Health Lowered

Hostile Mobs: 30% +0.5% Chance for each percentage of Health Lowered

GRADE 3

Passive Mobs: 100% Chance

Hostile Mobs: 45% +0.75% Chance for each percentage of Health Lowered

GRADE 4

Passive Mobs: 100% Chance

Hostile Mobs: 50% +0.75% Chance for each percentage of Health Lowered

GRADE 5

Passive Mobs: 100% Chance

Hostile Mobs: 75% +1% Chance for each percentage of Health Lowered
